articles.title: Formidable Red Sox extend win streak to 11 games with doubleheader sweep of Rays
articles.description:
Boston’s 11-game winning streak is the franchise’s longest since 2016.

The post Formidable Red Sox extend win streak to 11 games with doubleheader sweep of Rays appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox sweep doubleheader against Rays, extending winning streak to 11 games.
This is Boston's longest win streak since 2016, boosting team morale.
Increased local excitement may lead to higher attendance at upcoming games.
